isolation.writes: annotation labels/notes use unique UTC timestamp suffix 20260405T093140Z

assertions.title: Multi-day sparklines with shared day axis and baseline bands

steps.action: Open Recovery view for Mar 24-28, 2026 in browser session
steps.expected: Readiness/HRV/RHR/Body Temp Deviation sparklines align on shared day axis with baseline bands and event marker spanning panels
steps.observed: Shared axis and baseline bands render; event markers/vertical guides are visible across stacked panels, but panel set is Readiness/HRV/RHR/Sleep Score (Body Temp Deviation panel missing).

assertions.issues: Assertion requires Body Temp Deviation sparkline; observed Sleep Score sparkline instead.

assertions.title: Daily score table with traffic-light colors

steps.action: Inspect Recovery daily table for Mar 24-28
steps.expected: Daily Readiness/Sleep/HRV rows use red/yellow/green traffic-light encoding with recovery progression visible
steps.observed: Table cells include traffic-light dots (e.g., readiness Tue/Wed green, Sat yellow; HRV Tue red then green later; Sleep row includes red/yellow/green states).

assertions.title: S3 scenario — post-workout recovery arc visible at a glance

steps.action: Validate S3-specific expectations on Recovery view (workout marker, 42→82 readiness recovery, 26→48 HRV recovery, red→yellow→green progression, insight text mentions 3 days)
steps.expected: All S3 values/patterns present and identifiable quickly
steps.observed: Workout marker exists, but observed values do not match S3 targets (readiness: 91,98,95,84,67; HRV: 23.3,49.9,70.1,79.6,76.4), and no insight text stating “3 days” recovery.

assertions.issues: S3 fixture expectations are not met on current local surface.

assertions.title: Annotation created via API appears as marker on Recovery View

steps.expected: Response annotations include created workout annotation

steps.action: Open Recovery UI for same range
steps.expected: Workout marker visible at correct day position
steps.observed: Workout marker appears on day axis for Tue 24 in Recovery view.

assertions.title: Same annotation visible on both Night and Recovery views

steps.expected: Both responses include same annotation id
steps.observed: Night annotations include id=2298; Recovery annotations include id=2298.
Meal marker rendered on Night and Recovery screens.

assertions.title: Annotation outside night window excluded from Night view

steps.expected: Night excludes annotation (outside 8pm-8am window); Recovery includes it in range
steps.observed: Night annotations do not include id=2299, Recovery annotations include id=2299.

evidence.network: POST /api/annotations -> 201 (frontend-views/browser-recovery-flow/val-cross-023-meal-day-post.meta.txt), GET /api/views/night -> 200 and GET /api/views/recovery -> 200 with annotation-id presence summary in frontend-views/browser-recovery-flow/api-evidence-summary.json

frictions.description: Direct navigation to /dashboard/recovery initially redirected to /sign-in in isolated browser session.
frictions.resolution: Generated owner __session token via mock-auth helper and set browser cookie before opening dashboard routes.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned no captured requests on this run.
frictions.resolution: Captured API request/response evidence with curl (status/meta + JSON bodies) and referenced those artifacts in each assertion.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-UIRCV-002, VAL-CROSS-002, VAL-CROSS-022, VAL-CROSS-023), 2 failed (VAL-UIRCV-001 missing Body Temp Deviation panel; VAL-UIRCV-003 S3 scenario expectations not met on local surface).
